title: ML Platform Engineer
description: Build internal ML platforms, productionize APIs, manage model deployment pipelines, and improve developer workflows for data and AI teams.

title: AI Full-Stack Engineer
description: Ship AI products end to end, integrating LLM workflows into a React frontend with scalable Python backends and strong UX execution.

title: NLP Data Scientist
description: Own NLP experimentation, evaluate retrieval and ranking quality, and translate product questions into measurable models and recommendations.

title: Backend Engineer (Python)
description: Design backend services, own API contracts, improve observability, and deliver reliable distributed systems for high-volume commerce traffic.

title: Generative AI Engineer
description: Build retrieval-augmented AI applications, measure prompt quality, and create robust pipelines around embeddings, vector search, and grounding.

title: Frontend Engineer
description: Lead frontend implementation, maintain a high-quality design system, and build resilient dashboards with clean user flows and measurable usability.

title: Cloud DevOps Engineer
description: Automate cloud infrastructure, harden deployment pipelines, and improve reliability, release speed, and incident response practices.

title: Product Analytics Engineer
description: Build analytical datasets, improve experiment reporting, and support product and growth teams with actionable metrics and clean pipelines.
